name: Eidos the Underworld Squire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>冥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>従</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>エイドス
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: During your Main Phase this turn, you can Tribute Summon 1 monster, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 monster with 800 ATK/1000 DEF in your GY, except "Eidos the Underworld Squire"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Eidos the Underworld Squire" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Advent of the True Monarch

summoning: Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
